## Summary

- What changed:
- Why this change is needed:
- Target repo: API | Reflex | CLI | docs/ops

## Scope

- [ ] Scoped to one repo boundary
- [ ] If cross-repo dependency exists, linked follow-up PR or handoff note is included

## Validation

- Commands run:
  - ``
- Result:
  - [ ] Pass
  - [ ] Partial (explain below)
  - [ ] Blocked (explain below)
- Notes:

## Risks / Follow-ups

- Risk level: low | medium | high
- Known risks:
- Follow-up work:

## Changelog / Docs

- [ ] Updated changelog for touched sub-repo (API/Reflex/CLI)
- [ ] No changelog needed (docs-only or internal non-behavioral change)
- [ ] Updated related docs/contracts/runbooks where applicable

## Required Checks

- [ ] CI checks green
- [ ] Lint/type/test checks green for touched scope
- [ ] Branch is up to date with target branch policy

## Review and Signoff

- [ ] Required human reviewer approval received
- [ ] Required agent signoff received
- [ ] No unresolved high-severity findings

## Merge Readiness

- [ ] PR title clearly states intent
- [ ] PR body is complete
- [ ] Ready to merge
